name: tcia-qin-prostate-tumor
truth: Prostate carcinoma — QIN-PROSTATE patient PCAMPMRI-00012. VE
second_bottom_line: A small suspicious focus in the LEFT posterolateral peripheral zone (mid-to-apex), with measured restricted diffusion and concordant high-b and early-enhancement signal, warrants targeted biopsy - the first read under-called it.

name: tcia-tcga-lihc-liver-full
second_bottom_line: An independent, pixel-by-pixel second read confirms a real ~2 cm solid hypovascular mass in the right hepatic lobe (segment V/VIII) that is suspicious but lacks the arterial hyperenhancement that defines HCC, so it stays LI-RADS LR-3/indeterminate and warrants biopsy or follow-up; the first read is confirmed.

name: nlm-shenzhen-cxr-normal
second_bottom_line: On focused, measured second review the chest radiograph is normal — no discrete focal lung lesion, mass, consolidation, effusion, or pneumothorax — and the first read's normal conclusion is confirmed.

name: msd-hippocampus-mr
truth: Normal hippocampus MR (MSD Task04, no pathology) — overcall
second_bottom_line: On focused, measured second review the visualised medial-temporal-lobe tissue is normal with no discrete focal lesion; the first read's benign conclusion is confirmed.
